title: Improve Agentish Quality
expectation: Use a feature-branch worktree under the canonical worktree location as the only mutable surface for this process; never rewrite Agentish files from the shared repository checkout. Iterate on one target Agentish subject file at a time: reload the Agentish language root, Agentish quality blueprint, and Agentish sections blueprint; evaluate the target file; rewrite it in the worktree branch; decide whether another local pass would materially improve quality; then obtain an independent quality evaluation and an independent rewritten blueprint-state to compare downstream quality.
idlePrompt: If the Agentish quality-improvement loop for the target file is complete, reply only with 'done: agentish quality improved'. If you are truly blocked on missing target-file, subject-state, or companion-context information, reply only with 'blocked: agentish quality improvement requires clarification'. Otherwise resume the improvement loop immediately and perform the next evaluation, rewrite, or comparison step instead of giving only a status update.
blockedToken: blocked: agentish quality improvement requires clarification
stopConditions: missing target-file, subject-state, or companion-context information

steps.title: Rewrite the target file in the worktree
Compare quality and blueprint-state downstream effects
Conclude or repeat the quality-improvement loop
